benchmark_metadata.title: Replay a ChIP-seq workflow and compare against a baseline Galaxy workflow

canonical_task_interpretation.task_family: paired-end ChIP-seq workflow replay and comparison
canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all replay and comparison work occurs in Galaxy

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.equivalence_call
expected_result_fields.description: Whether the replay is equivalent to baseline

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.local_peak_count
expected_result_fields.description: Peak count from the local replay

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.peak_count_delta
expected_result_fields.description: Difference between local and baseline peak counts

low_context: Infer that the task requires workflow replay plus output comparison.
medium_context: Use the supplied runtime parameters and compare against the baseline.
high_context: Run the local workflow file chipseq-pe.ga.

deterministic_checks.description: The paired FASTQs are handled correctly.
The replay is compared against the baseline workflow.

dimensions.name: workflow_replay_quality
dimensions.description: Correct import and execution of the local workflow

dimensions.name: reporting_and_provenance
dimensions.description: Auditability and clarity of the report

reference_answers_source.notes: Run manifest and comparison summary used as the target reference.
